supporting a viable Muslim community, promoting a comprehensive Islamic<br />

Family Takaful" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:left|color:%23b4a55c" google_fonts="font_family:Raleway%3A100%2C200%2C300%2Cregular%2C500%2C600%2C700%2C800%2C900|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal" css=".vc_custom_1706612317782{margin-top: 0em !important;}"][vc_column_text]</p>
<p style="color: black;">5th Pillar Family Takaful Limited is a new entrant into the Family<br />
Takaful sector of Pakistan which is supported by eminent<br />
business houses from Kuwait and Pakistan.[/vc_column_text][trx_sc_button type="default" new_window="" icon_position="left" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile="" link="https://5thpillartakaful.com/about-us/" title="More About Us" css=".vc_custom_1754480840766{margin-top: 2em !important;}"][/trx_sc_content][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/12" icons_position="left" offset="vc_col-lg-2 vc_col-md-2 vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1691414048544{padding-top: 4.4em !important;padding-bottom: 2em !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_custom_heading text="Mission &amp; Vision" font_container="tag:h2|text_align:center|color:%23b4a55c" google_fonts="font_family:Raleway%3A100%2C200%2C300%2Cregular%2C500%2C600%2C700%2C800%2C900|font_style:700%20bold%20regular%3A700%3Anormal"][vc_empty_space hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][trx_sc_icons align="center" size="medium" icons_animation="" icons="%5B%7B%22title%22%3A%22Our%20Vision%22%2C%22image%22%3A%226154%22%7D%5D" title_style="default" color="#b4a55c"][vc_empty_space alter_height="small" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_column_text]</p>
<p style="text-align: center; color: black;">Strengthen the financial capacity of our clients through innovative Shariah compliant Takaful products empowering them to achieve their cherished goals in life.</p>
<p>[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][trx_sc_icons align="center" size="medium" icons_animation="" icons="%5B%7B%22title%22%3A%22Our%20Mission%22%2C%22image%22%3A%226155%22%7D%5D" title_style="default" color="#b4a55c"][vc_empty_space alter_height="small" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_column_text]</p>
<p style="text-align: center; color: black;">Provide structured Takaful savings and protection solutions specifically to Muslims in Pakistan to perform Hajj, the 5th Pillar of Islam.</p>
<p>[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/3"][trx_sc_icons align="center" size="medium" icons_animation="" icons="%5B%7B%22title%22%3A%22Value%20Chain%22%2C%22image%22%3A%226156%22%7D%5D" title_style="default" color="#b4a55c"][vc_empty_space alter_height="small" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_column_text]</p>
<p style="text-align: center; color: black;">5th Pillar Takaful Limited provides a complete end-to-end value chain, supporting you from the moment you start saving till the moment you've performed Hajj and are back home.</p>
<p>[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1707714423180{padding-top: 2em 2.2em !important;}"]Dr. Mufti Muhammad Imran Ashraf Usmani, a renowned Shariah Advisor,<br />
has been appointed to certify the Shariah compliance of all our products<br />
and operations. His guidance ensures that the Takaful/Insurance<br />
we offer meets the highest standards of compliance.</p>
<p>Dr. Mufti Muhammad Imran Ashraf Usmani, son of Justice (Retd.) Mufti<br />
Muhammad Taqi Usmani, graduated with specialization in Islamic<br />
Fiqh (Islamic jurisprudence) from Jamia Darul-Uloom, Karachi.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][trx_sc_button type="default" new_window="" icon_position="left" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook=""
